snippet.title: Full Video: Chikiri Chikiri | Peddi | Ram Charan | Janhvi | Buchi Babu | AR Rahman | Mohit Chauhan
snippet.description:
🔥🎶 Get ready to groove to the vibrant beats of "Chikiri Chikiri" from Peddi!

Featuring Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor, this energetic song blends electrifying visuals, catchy rhythms, and unforgettable musical brilliance. Composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman and brought to life by the dynamic vocals of Mohit Chauhan, Chikiri Chikiri is a celebration of music, dance, and cinematic grandeur.

Directed by Buchi Babu Sana, Peddi promises a larger-than-life entertainment experience.

🎬 Movie: Peddi
⭐ Starring: Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor
🎶 Music: A.R. Rahman
🎤 Singer: Mohit Chauhan
🎥 Director: Buchi Babu Sana

Turn up the volume and enjoy the full video of this musical sensation!

#ChikiriChikiri #Peddi #RamCharan #JanhviKapoor #ARRahman #MohitChauhan #BuchiBabuSana #TeluguSongs #Tollywood #Trending #Music #VideoSong

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

We will update you if the plan changes.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

#yrfspyuniverse #yrfnewreleases #yrf #alpha #yashraj #yashrajfilms #yrfmovies #yrfmusic #yashchopra #adityachopra #akshayewidhani #aliabhatt #sharvari #anilkapoor #bobbydeol #shivrawail 

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka | Superhit Romantic Rain Song | Andaaz
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar 


#AayegaMazaAbBarsaatKa #Andaaz #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #AkshayKumar #PriyankaChopra #LaraDutta #RomanticSong #RainSong #BollywoodSongs #HindiSongs #EvergreenHits #NadeemShravan #Sameer #ShreeKrishnaInternational

en.title: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka | Superhit Romantic Rain Song | Andaaz
en.description:
Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar

bn.title: Alpha ট্রেলার • রিঅ্যাকশন
bn.description:
#আলফা #দ্যপিজে #পিজেএক্সপ্লেইনড

আমার সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া হ্যান্ডেলগুলো: 
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
টুইটার: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
স্ন্যাপচ্যাট: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

থ্রেডস: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
ফেসবুক: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

thePJ হলো একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমা নিয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই উদ্দেশ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of Ananthan Kaadu starring Arya in the lead role.

Ananthan Kaadu arrives in theatres on 25 June 2026.

Directed by Jiyen Krishnakumar, written by Murali Gopy, and produced by S. Vinod Kumar under the banner of Mini Studio's. Music composed by B. Ajaneesh Loknath.

Cast:
Arya, Indrans, , Sunil, Nikhila Vimal,  Regena Cassandrra, Siddique, Ajay, Bose Venkat, Dev Mohan, Renji Panicker, Anjali P Nair, Santhy Balachandran, Achyuth Kumar, Vijayaraghavan, Sagar Surya, Alsyn Benny, Sarath Appani

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 presents 
In association with Seeta Films & Rakesh Dang 
A Base Industries Group Production 
Produced by Firoz  A.  Nadiadwallah, Rakesh Dang & Vedant Vikaas Baali
Director: Ahmed Khan
Co Producer: Shaira Ahmed Khan

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

🎧 Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

🎬 Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:
Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Everytime every minute of the day
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Rabb yaar gale le saar meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Tu jeet meri jag haar meri
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Nahi Hosh Tu Mujhe Thaamle
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

bn.description:
পপি প্লেটাইম চ্যাপ্টার ৬ বাতিল: টিজার ট্রেলার রিঅ্যাকশন সম্পূর্ণ গেমপ্লে (হিন্দি)

পপি প্লেটাইম চ্যাপ্টার ৫
আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লাগবে এবং আপনারা এটি উপভোগ করবেন :)
______________________
💙 আজকের ভিডিওটির অনুপ্রেরণার জন্য এই অসাধারণ নির্মাতাদের জানাই অশেষ ধন্যবাদ ও কৃতজ্ঞতা:

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

snippet.title: MAA KA SAYA I माँ का साया I OFFICIAL TRAILER I ANJANA SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #bhojpurimovie rakeshbabu #maakasaya #bhojpurimovie #trailer #trending 

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH RAAKI FILMS LLP

फ़िल्म - माँ का साया

कलाकार - अंजना  सिंह  , राकेश  बाबू  , भूपेंद्र  सिंह  , कंचन  मिश्रा  , अयाज़  खान  की  सी .पी भट्ट , निशा  सिंह  , श्वेता  यादव, रिंकू  आयुषी  , सुरेंद्र  कुमार  त्रिपाठी  , स्वेता  यादव  
बाल कलाकार  – ढोलू  , पल्लवी

कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह

निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुडूरी

लेखक - सत्येंद्र सिंह

संगीतकार- ओम झा

संकलन - प्रीतम नायक

छायांकन- महेंद्र मंगती (माही )

ट्रेलर - धरम सोनी  
मारधार    – दिनेश  यादव   
कोरियोग्राफर - प्रवीण सालार
एसोसिएट डायरेक्टर  – रवि  तिवारी  , सुवेश , मेज़र , अमन  सिंह  
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन -बॉलीवुड उमंग

आर्ट डायरेक्टर – शिवा जयसवाल
पब्लिसिटी डिज़ाइनर : देवा आर्ट ( सूरज गिरी )
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, अथर्व सिंह

 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
,सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी


B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 

मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  

प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , , हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , 

FILM- MAA KA SAYA 

STARCAST- ANJANA SINGH , RAKESH BABU , BHUPENDRA SINGH , KANCHAN MISHRA , AYAZ KHAN C.P BHATT, NISHA SINGH , SHWETA YADAV ,RINKU AYUSHI , SURENDRA KUMAR TRIPATHI , SWETA YADAV 
CHILD ARTIST – DHOLU , PALLAVI
DIRECTOR- PRAVEEN KUMAR GUDURI  
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER – SATYENDRA SINGH
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA  
LYRICS – PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- PREETAM NAYAK

ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR – RAVI TIWARI , SUVESH, MAZER, AMAN SINGH 
CHOREOGRAPHER- PRAVEEN SAILAR
ART DIRECTOR- SHIVA JAISWAL
POST PRODUCTION – BOLLYWOOD UMANG 
PROMO EDITOR – DHARAM SONI 
ACTION – DINESH YADAV  
Publicity Designer : Dewa Art ( Suraj Giri )

 satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV

snippet.title: Aravindh - Music Video | Albuquerque Records | Anirudh Ravichander
snippet.description:
#Aravindh has arrived and how. Aravindh is every artist out there yearning for that one shot to show what they've got and with a heart full of hope to be seen, celebrated and loved. 

AUDIO CREDITS: 

Song Title : Aravindh
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics by Super Subu
Vocals by Anirudh Ravichander

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboard, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Additional Music Programmed by Smith Asher, Urban Thozha, Marshall Robinson
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Shashank Vijay, Karthik Vamsi, Kalyan
Acoustic, Electric Guitars by Keba Jeremiah
Additional Guitars & Ukulele by Joel Jebnesan Jacob
Backing Vocals by Velu, Aravind Annest
Vocal Adlibs by Rockzane

Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya

Recorded at Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Srinivasan M & Vinay Sridhar at Albuquerque Records
Stem Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B

VIDEO CREDITS TAMIL:

MUSIC COMPOSER: ANIRUDH RAVICHANDER
DIRECTOR : DOWN TRODDEN

snippet.title: Sarpanch | Official Trailer | Dev Kharoud | Jasmin Bajwa | Sarbjit | Gurbaz | Dakssh | Rel 10th July
snippet.description:
🔥 Presenting the Official Trailer of “Sarpanch” starring Dev Kharoud & Jasmin Bajwa — releasing worldwide in theatres on 10th July 2026

Ohri Productions & Fatehjeet Film Productions proudly bring an action-packed Punjabi entertainer filled with power, emotions, politics, and village pride.

🎬 Movie Credits
▪️Starcast: Dev Kharoud, Jasmin Bajwa, Sarbjit Cheema, Gurbaz Singh, Saanvi Dhiman, Dakssh Ajit Singh, Deedar Gill, Parmod Pabbi, Bindu Bhullar 
▪️Director: Mandeep Benipal

▪️Co-Producer: Sanchit Ohri & Navjot Kaur
▪️Concept: Dev Kharoud 
▪️Story: Rana Ranbir
▪️Screenplay: Rana Ranbir & Iqbal Soni
▪️Dialogues: Gurpreet Sehji 
▪️Music: Gurmeet Singh, Avvy Sra & Casino

snippet.title: Kalank Title Track - Lyrical | Alia Bhatt , Varun Dhawan | Arijit Singh | Pritam| Amitabh
snippet.description:
Music - Pritam
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Singers - Arijit Singh

Music Production & Sound Design - DJ Phukan & Sunny M.R.
Music Programmed and Arranged - Sunny M.R., Arijit Singh & Jim Satya
Additional Music Programming - Prasad Sashte
Mix & Master - Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge

Harmonium - Arijit Singh
Tabla - Ishteyak Khan, Sukanto Singha & Vinayak Netke
Rabaab, Mandolin & Various Pluck Instruments - Tapas Roy
Kanun - Tamer Pinarbasi
Acoustic & Electric Guitar - Aditya Shankar, Roland Fernandes
Spanish Guitar - Pedro Medina Morejon De Giron
Bass - Raj Kumar Dewan, Roland Fernandes & Sunny M.R.

Strings (Bangkok, Thailand) at Studio28
Violin 1 - Chalat Limpisiri, Thanaporn Sathienwaree, Pacharapol Techatanachai, Karn Watcharaprapapong, Bodin Pukang, Ittipat Pisalchaiyapol, Khajeepaan Jangjamras & Anapat Vuthithanthaveekij
Violin 2 - Pittaya Pruksacholavit, Pongsit Karnkriangkrai, Napat Nanasombat, Teesin Puriwatthanapong, Varissara Tanakom, Patcharapan Sombuntanon, Kittipith Kaivikai & Tassanai Punprasert
Viola - Suvijak Chotikool, Nawattasit Kanjanajai, Thachapol Namwong, Pongthep Jitduangprem, Surachon Lerdlop, Jitsamon Shattrakom, Nitivadee Kaosard & Yuwadee Kanchanasatit
Cello - Nichapa Nilkaew, Teerakiat Kerdlarp, Vannophat Kaploykeo, Saran Charoennit, Roypim Thavornsuwan & Vorapon Thannuekmeesinkul
ContraBass - Rutawat Sintutepparat & Prawwanisita Neesanant
Conducted By - Trisdee na Patalung

Vocal Production - Tushar Joshi & Arijit Singh
Vocal Conductors - Tushar Joshi & Kaushik Das

Chief Sound Engineer & Shootmix by Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers - Ashwin Kulkarni, Aaroh Velankar, Himanshu Shirlekar, Kaushik Das, Aniruddh Anantha & Harjot Kaur
Assistant to Shadab - Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar

Music Team - Shloke Lal
Presentation Members - Rahul Tiwari and Zafar Ansari

Chorus - Tushar Joshi, Kaushik Das and Sukanto Singha

Music Production Manager - Anurag Sharma

🔔 Subscribe to Bollywood Lyrical Songs and turn on notifications to enjoy daily lyrical song uploads and the latest Bollywood music updates.

snippet.title: Bhootam Bhayyam | Official Teaser | Karan,Neel,Saurabh,Siddhant,Shubam,Pushkaraj,Manmeet | 24 Jul
snippet.description:
ना काम ना धाम, फक्त भूतांचा प्रोग्राम

२४ जुलैपासून चित्रपटगृहात.

#TeaserOutNow #BhootamBhayyam 

झी स्टुडिओज् आणि #KyraKumarKreations

घेऊन येतायत हॉरर कॉमेडी विश्वातला गेमचेंजर मराठी सिनेमा
“भूतम् भयम” २४ जुलै पासून तुमच्या जवळच्या चित्रपटगृहात !
#BhootamBhayyam #24July2026 #NewMovie

Writer, Director: Ramchandra Gaonkar
Produced by : Naren Kumar, Mahesh Korade
Presented by: ZeestudiosMarathi 
Bavesh Janavlekar (Zee Studios)

snippet.description:
High Court (Official Video) Diler Kharkiya | Fiza Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026

यह एक नया संगीत वीडियो है जिसमें एक महिला नाचती और गाती हुई दिखाई देती है। यह एक हिंदी song है जिसमें एक रोमांटिक Haryanvi song का अनुभव मिलता है। वीडियो में एक जोड़े को बातचीत करते हुए और अन्य लोगों को रंगीन पृष्ठभूमि में नाचते हुए देखा जा सकता है, जो इसे एक trending song बनाता है।

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

Deep Laath tere gaane te, teri basai ne hota naaz chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa, your work is carried out, with the whole village following you.

The children of the city are fans when they chant the name of Ram.

Come, let the ship sail and the procession sail, let the tradition of my village continue.

All the men are jailed, ships worth 80 lakhs sail.

Oh, the whole circle of friends, in which there is brotherhood.

Sirkod is the man with whom you fight in jail.

Oh, the world is your crazy fan, I praise you a lot.

When the enemy becomes you, I sacrifice my life.

Oh, let the eagle sail, let the sovereignty sail, O sons of those whose itch is gone.

Vaid, great scoundrel What, you're doing, let's go for treatment.
Come on, let the ship sail and the market go, let my Gama tradition continue.

All the jail-bound baoli, ships worth 80 lakhs sailed.
He had a Robin Hood-like image, I heard it all over Gama.

From the theke to Dabwali, and from the site to Gurgaon.
Come to Panchkula and Mahendragarh, work unabated.

Your son is the one holding the drum, the one blowing the khokha.
Let the music play, let the sound play, let the rule of the black diggal continue.

Your deep lath sings your songs, your home is proud.
Come on, let the ship sail and the market go, let my Gama tradition continue.

All the jail-bound baoli, Ships worth 80 lakhs sailed

snippet.title: श्रेक 5 (Shrek 5) | Official Hindi Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
In cinemas summer 2027
Follow us on Facebook at / https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/   
Find us on Instagram at / https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/  
Follow us on Twitter at https://x.com/UniversalIND

Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy
adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5.
 
Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar ®️  nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their
signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey,
Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello
Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart)
as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle.
 
Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and
Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award ®️ nominated
Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and
Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of Shrek fan-favorite Gingerbread Man,
aka “Gingy,” across all titles in the Shrek Universe. Dohrn worked on the second and third Shrek
films as a writer and artist and as Head of Story on the fourth film. Dohrn also voiced the
character of Rumpelstiltskin in Shrek Forever After. Dohrn served as co-director on the first
Trolls film and directed Trolls World Tour and Trolls Band Together.
 
The film is produced by returning producer Gina Shay (Trolls franchise), who produced Shrek
Forever After and by Illumination CEO and Academy Award ®️ nominee Chris Meledandri (the
Super Mario, Despicable Me and Minions franchises). The film is co-directed by Brad Ableson
(Minions: The Rise of Gru, The Simpsons).
 
For the past two decades, audiences have been enchanted by the delightful, irreverent
adventures of a misunderstood ogre and his ragtag group of roguish fairytale folk, based on the
book by acclaimed author William Steig. Beginning in 2001 with Shrek, the winner of the first
ever Academy Award ®️ for Best Animated Feature, Shrek, Donkey and Fiona (along with their
friends, family and tormentors), have grown into an indelible part of pop culture, reminding
audiences around the globe that beauty is in the eye of the beholder.
 

The four Shrek films have earned more than $2.9 billion worldwide, spawning a global live-
touring show, an award-winning Broadway musical that earned eight Tony nominations and 12
Drama Desk nominations, plus an immersive, top-tourist destination in London and popular
events and attractions across Universal Destinations & Experiences theme parks.

hi.title: श्रेक 5 (Shrek 5) | आधिकारिक हिंदी टीज़र ट्रेलर
hi.description:
सिनेमाघरों में, ग्रीष्म 2027
हमें फेसबुक पर फॉलो करें: https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/
हमें इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें: https://x.com/UniversalIND

अगली गर्मियों में, ड्रीमवर्क्स एनिमेशन दर्शकों को एक रोमांचक, जादुई नई कॉमेडी
एडवेंचर में आमंत्रित करता है, जो सर्वकालिक सबसे प्रिय वैश्विक एनिमेटेड फ्रेंचाइजी में से एक है: श्रेक 5।

कॉमेडी के दिग्गज माइक मायर्स, ऑस्कर®️ नामांकित एडी मर्फी और कैमरून डियाज़ श्रेक, डोंकी और फियोना के रूप में अपनी
प्रसिद्ध भूमिकाओं में लौट रहे हैं। एमी पुरस्कार विजेता सुपरस्टार ज़ेंडाया (द ओडिसी,
ड्यून फ्रैंचाइज़) श्रेक और फियोना की बेटी फेलिशिया के किरदार में नज़र आती हैं। उनके साथ मार्सेलो
हर्नांडेज़ (सैटरडे नाइट लाइव, हैप्पी गिलमोर 2) और स्काइलर गिसांडो (सुपरमैन, बुकस्मार्ट)
फेलिशिया के भाइयों, फर्गस और फ़ार्कल के रूप में शामिल हैं।

श्रेक 5 का निर्देशन प्रशंसित फिल्म निर्माता और श्रेक फ्रैंचाइज़ के दिग्गज कॉनरैड वर्नन और
वॉल्ट डोर्न ने किया है। वर्नन अकादमी पुरस्कार®️ के लिए नामांकित
श्रेक 2 के साथ-साथ ड्रीमवर्क्स एनिमेशन की मैडागास्कर 3: यूरोप्स मोस्ट वांटेड और
मॉन्स्टर्स वर्सेस एलियंस के निर्देशन दल के सदस्य थे। वर्नन ने श्रेक यूनिवर्स की सभी फिल्मों में श्रेक के प्रशंसकों के पसंदीदा जिंजरब्रेड मैन,
उर्फ "गिंजी" को अपनी आवाज़ दी है। डॉर्न ने श्रेक की दूसरी और तीसरी फिल्मों में लेखक और कलाकार के रूप में काम किया, और चौथी फिल्म में कहानी के प्रमुख के रूप में कार्य किया। डॉर्न ने श्रेक फॉरएवर आफ्टर में रम्पेलस्टिल्टस्किन के किरदार को आवाज़ भी दी। डॉर्न ने पहली ट्रोल्स फिल्म में सह-निर्देशक के रूप में काम किया और ट्रोल्स वर्ल्ड टूर और ट्रोल्स बैंड टुगेदर का निर्देशन किया।

फिल्म का निर्माण ट्रोल्स फ्रैंचाइज़ की निर्माता जीना शे (जिन्होंने श्रेक फॉरएवर आफ्टर का निर्माण किया था) और इल्यूमिनेशन के सीईओ और अकादमी पुरस्कार®️ नामांकित क्रिस मेलेडांड्री (सुपर मारियो, डेस्पिकेबल मी और मिनियंस फ्रैंचाइज़) द्वारा किया गया है। फिल्म का सह-निर्देशन ब्रैड एब्लेसन (मिनियंस: द राइज़ ऑफ़ ग्रू, द सिम्पसन्स) ने किया है।


पिछले दो दशकों से, दर्शक विलियम स्टीग नामक प्रशंसित लेखक की पुस्तक पर आधारित, एक गलत समझे गए राक्षस और उसके शरारती परीकथा पात्रों के मनमोहक, बेपरवाह कारनामों से मंत्रमुग्ध होते रहे हैं।
वर्ष 2001 में सर्वश्रेष्ठ एनिमेटेड फीचर के लिए पहला अकादमी पुरस्कार®️ जीतने वाली फिल्म श्रेक से शुरू होकर, श्रेक, डोंकी और फियोना (अपने दोस्तों, परिवार और उत्पीड़कों के साथ) पॉप संस्कृति का एक अभिन्न अंग बन गए हैं, जो दुनिया भर के दर्शकों को याद दिलाते हैं कि सुंदरता देखने वाले की नज़र में होती है।


श्रेक की चारों फिल्मों ने दुनिया भर में 2.9 अरब डॉलर से अधिक की कमाई की है, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप एक वैश्विक लाइव-टूरिंग शो, एक पुरस्कार विजेता ब्रॉडवे संगीत कार्यक्रम (जिसे आठ टोनी नामांकन और 12 ड्रामा डेस्क नामांकन प्राप्त हुए), लंदन में एक आकर्षक पर्यटन स्थल और यूनिवर्सल डेस्टिनेशंस एंड एक्सपीरियंस थीम पार्कों में लोकप्रिय कार्यक्रम और आकर्षण विकसित हुए हैं।

de-DE.title: Shrek 5 | Offizieller Hindi-Teaser-Trailer
de-DE.description:
Ab Sommer 2027 im Kino
Folgen Sie uns auf Facebook unter / https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Finden Sie uns auf Instagram unter / https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/ 
Folgen Sie uns auf Twitter unter https://x.com/UniversalIND

Nächsten Sommer lädt DreamWorks Animation das Publikum zu einem spannenden, magischen neuen Comedy-Abenteuer ein – basierend auf einer der beliebtesten Animationsfilmreihen aller Zeiten: Shrek 5.

Die Comedy-Legenden Mike Myers, Oscar®-nominierter Eddie Murphy und Cameron Diaz kehren in ihren Paraderollen als Shrek, Esel und Fiona zurück. Die Emmy-prämierte Superstar Zendaya (Die Odyssee, Dune-Reihe) stößt als Shreks und Fionas Tochter Felicia zum Cast hinzu, ebenso wie Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) und Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) als Felicias Brüder Fergus und Farkle.

Shrek 5 wird von den gefeierten Filmemachern und Shrek-Veteranen Conrad Vernon und Walt Dohrn inszeniert. Vernon war Teil des Regieteams des Oscar®-nominierten Shrek 2 sowie von DreamWorks Animations Madagascar 3: Flucht durch Europa und Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon lieh außerdem dem bei den Shrek-Fans beliebten Lebkuchenmann, alias „Gingy“, in allen Filmen des Shrek-Universums seine Stimme. Dohrn arbeitete an den zweiten und dritten Shrek-Filmen als Autor und Zeichner und als Story-Chef am vierten Film. Außerdem sprach Dohrn die Rolle von Rumpelstilzchen in „Für immer Shrek“. Dohrn war Co-Regisseur des ersten Trolls-Films und führte Regie bei „Trolls World Tour“ und „Trolls – Band zusammen“.

Der Film wird von der Produzentin Gina Shay (Trolls-Franchise), die bereits „Für immer Shrek“ produzierte, und von Illumination-CEO und Oscar®-nominiertem Chris Meledandri (Super Mario-, Ich – Einfach unverbesserlich- und Minions-Franchises) produziert. Co-Regie führt Brad Ableson („Minions – Auf der Suche nach dem Mini-Boss“, „Die Simpsons“).

Seit zwei Jahrzehnten begeistern die liebenswerten, frechen Abenteuer eines missverstandenen Ogers und seiner bunt zusammengewürfelten Gruppe von Märchenfiguren das Publikum. Die Geschichten basieren auf dem Buch des gefeierten Autors William Steig. Angefangen mit Shrek im Jahr 2001, dem Gewinner des allerersten Oscar® für den besten Animationsfilm, sind Shrek, Esel und Fiona (sowie ihre Freunde, Familie und Peiniger) zu einem festen Bestandteil der Popkultur geworden und erinnern Zuschauer weltweit daran, dass Schönheit im Auge des Betrachters liegt.
... Die vier Shrek-Filme haben weltweit mehr als 2,9 Milliarden Dollar eingespielt und eine globale Live-Tournee, ein preisgekröntes Broadway-Musical mit acht Tony-Nominierungen und zwölf Drama Desk-Nominierungen hervorgebracht, sowie eine immersive, beliebte Touristenattraktion in London und beliebte Veranstaltungen und Attraktionen in den Themenparks von Universal Destinations & Experiences.

it.title: Shrek 5 | Teaser Trailer Ufficiale in Hindi
it.description:
Al cinema nell'estate del 2027
Seguiteci su Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/
Trovateci su Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Seguiteci su Twitter: https://x.com/UniversalIND

La prossima estate, DreamWorks Animation invita il pubblico a vivere una nuova, emozionante e magica avventura comica tratta da uno dei franchise d'animazione più amati di tutti i tempi: Shrek 5.

Le leggende della commedia Mike Myers, il candidato all'Oscar® Eddie Murphy e Cameron Diaz tornano a interpretare i loro ruoli iconici di Shrek, Ciuchino e Fiona. La superstar vincitrice di un Emmy Zendaya (L'Odissea,
la saga di Dune) si unisce al cast nel ruolo di Felicia, la figlia di Shrek e Fiona, insieme a Marcello
Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) e Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart)
nei ruoli dei fratelli di Felicia, Fergus e Farkle.

Shrek 5 è diretto dagli acclamati registi e veterani del franchise di Shrek, Conrad Vernon e
Walt Dohrn. Vernon ha fatto parte del team di regia di Shrek 2, candidato all'Oscar®, così come di Madagascar 3: Ricercati in Europa e Mostri contro Alieni della DreamWorks Animation. Vernon ha anche prestato la voce all'amatissimo Omino di Pan di Zenzero,
detto "Gingy", in tutti i titoli dell'universo di Shrek. Dohrn ha lavorato al secondo e al terzo film di Shrek come sceneggiatore e disegnatore, e come responsabile della storia nel quarto film. Dohrn ha anche doppiato il personaggio di Tremotino in Shrek e vissero per sempre felici e contenti. Dohrn è stato co-regista del primo film di Trolls e ha diretto Trolls World Tour e Trolls Band Together.

Il film è prodotto da Gina Shay (franchise di Trolls), produttrice di Shrek e vissero per sempre felici e contenti, e da Chris Meledandri, CEO di Illumination e candidato all'Oscar® (franchise di Super Mario, Cattivissimo me e Minions). La co-regia è di Brad Ableson (Minions: The Rise of Gru, I Simpson).


Negli ultimi due decenni, il pubblico è rimasto incantato dalle deliziose e irriverenti avventure di un orco incompreso e del suo gruppo eterogeneo di birichini delle fiabe, basate sul libro dell'acclamato autore William Steig. A partire dal 2001 con Shrek, vincitore del primo Premio Oscar®️ per il miglior film d'animazione, Shrek, Ciuchino e Fiona (insieme ai loro amici, familiari e aguzzini) sono diventati parte integrante della cultura pop, ricordando al pubblico di tutto il mondo che la bellezza è negli occhi di chi guarda.



I quattro film di Shrek hanno incassato oltre 2,9 miliardi di dollari in tutto il mondo, dando vita a uno spettacolo itinerante globale, a un musical di Broadway pluripremiato che ha ottenuto otto nomination ai Tony Award e dodici ai Drama Desk Award, oltre a una meta turistica di prim'ordine a Londra e a eventi e attrazioni popolari nei parchi a tema di Universal Destinations & Experiences.

es-US.title: Shrek 5 | Tráiler oficial de avance en hindi
es-US.description:
En cines en el verano de 2027
Síguenos en Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/
Encuéntranos en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Síguenos en Twitter: https://x.com/UniversalIND

El próximo verano, DreamWorks Animation invita al público a una nueva y emocionante comedia mágica
de una de las franquicias animadas más queridas de todos los tiempos: Shrek 5.

Las leyendas de la comedia Mike Myers, el nominado al Oscar® Eddie Murphy y Cameron Diaz retoman sus
papeles icónicos como Shrek, Burro y Fiona. La superestrella ganadora del Emmy, Zendaya (La Odisea,
la saga Dune), se une al reparto como Felicia, la hija de Shrek y Fiona, junto con Marcello
Hernández (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) y Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart)
como los hermanos de Felicia, Fergus y Farkle.
Shrek 5 está dirigida por los aclamados cineastas y veteranos de la saga Shrek, Conrad Vernon y
Walt Dohrn. Vernon formó parte del equipo de dirección de
Shrek 2, nominada al Premio de la Academia®, así como de Madagascar 3: Los más buscados de Europa y
Monstruos contra alienígenas, de DreamWorks Animation. Vernon también ha prestado su voz al Hombre de Jengibre, el personaje favorito de los fans de Shrek,
también conocido como "Gingy", en todos los títulos del Universo Shrek. Dohrn trabajó en la segunda y tercera película de Shrek
como guionista y dibujante, y como jefe de historia en la cuarta. Dohrn también prestó su voz al
personaje de Rumpelstiltskin en Shrek para siempre. Dohrn fue codirector de la primera película de Trolls y dirigió Trolls World Tour y Trolls Band Together.

La película está producida por Gina Shay (franquicia Trolls), quien ya produjo Shrek para siempre, y por Chris Meledandri, director ejecutivo de Illumination y nominado al Premio de la Academia® (franquicias Super Mario, Gru, mi villano favorito y Minions). La película está codirigida por Brad Ableson (Minions: El origen de Gru, Los Simpson).

 Durante las últimas dos décadas, el público se ha dejado cautivar por las encantadoras e irreverentes aventuras de un ogro incomprendido y su peculiar grupo de pícaros personajes de cuentos de hadas, basadas en el libro del aclamado autor William Steig. Desde Shrek en 2001, ganadora del primer Premio Óscar a la Mejor Película de Animación, Shrek, Burro y Fiona (junto con sus amigos, familiares y verdugos) se han convertido en parte esencial de la cultura popular, recordando al público de todo el mundo que la belleza está en los ojos del que mira.

 

Las cuatro películas de Shrek han recaudado más de 2900 millones de dólares en todo el mundo, dando lugar a un espectáculo en vivo de gira mundial, un musical de Broadway galardonado que obtuvo ocho nominaciones a los premios Tony y doce a los premios Drama Desk, además de un destino turístico inmersivo de primer orden en Londres y populares eventos y atracciones en los parques temáticos de Universal Destinations & Experiences.

fr-FR.title: Shrek 5 | Bande-annonce officielle en hindi
fr-FR.description:
Au cinéma à l'été 2027

Suivez-nous sur Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/

Retrouvez-nous sur Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/

Suivez-nous sur Twitter : https://x.com/UniversalIND

L'été prochain, DreamWorks Animation invite le public à vivre une nouvelle aventure comique et magique,

issue de l'une des franchises d'animation les plus appréciées au monde : Shrek 5.

Les légendes de la comédie Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy (nommé aux Oscars®) et Cameron Diaz reprennent leurs
rôles emblématiques de Shrek, l'Âne et Fiona. La superstar Zendaya (récompensée aux Emmy Awards pour *L'Odyssée* et la franchise *Dune*) rejoint le casting dans le rôle de Felicia, la fille de Shrek et Fiona. Marcello Hernandez (*Saturday Night Live*, *Happy Gilmore 2*) et Skyler Gisondo (*Superman*, *Booksmart*) incarnent respectivement Fergus et Farkle, les frères de Felicia.

*Shrek 5* est réalisé par les cinéastes de renom et vétérans de la franchise *Shrek*, Conrad Vernon et Walt Dohrn. Vernon a fait partie de l'équipe de réalisation de *Shrek 2*, nominé aux Oscars®, ainsi que de *Madagascar 3 : Bons Baisers d'Europe* et de *Monstres contre Aliens*, produits par DreamWorks Animation. Il prête également sa voix au personnage culte du Bonhomme de pain d'épice, alias « Gingy », dans tous les films de l'univers Shrek. Dohrn a travaillé sur les deuxième et troisième films Shrek
en tant que scénariste et dessinateur, et comme responsable du scénario sur le quatrième. Il a également prêté sa voix au personnage de Rumplestiltskin dans Shrek 4. Il a été coréalisateur du premier film Trolls et a réalisé Trolls 2 : Tournée mondiale et Trolls 3 : Ensemble.

Le film est produit par Gina Shay (la franchise Trolls), qui a également produit Shrek 4, et par Chris Meledandri, PDG d'Illumination et nominé aux Oscars® (les franchises Super Mario, Moi, moche et méchant et Les Minions). La réalisation est assurée par Brad Ableson (Les Minions 2 : Il était une fois, Les Simpson).

Depuis deux décennies, le public est enchanté par les aventures délicieuses et irrévérencieuses d'un ogre incompris et de sa bande hétéroclite de personnages de contes de fées espiègles, inspirées du livre du célèbre auteur William Steig. Dès 2001 avec Shrek, lauréat du tout premier Oscar® du meilleur film d'animation, Shrek, l'Âne et Fiona (ainsi que leurs amis, leur famille et leurs bourreaux) sont devenus une composante indélébile de la culture populaire, rappelant aux spectateurs du monde entier que la beauté est subjective.


Les quatre films Shrek ont ​​rapporté plus de 2,9 milliards de dollars dans le monde, donnant naissance à un spectacle itinérant mondial,

une comédie musicale primée à Broadway qui a obtenu huit nominations aux Tony Awards et douze nominations aux Drama Desk Awards,

ainsi qu'à une destination touristique immersive de premier plan à Londres et à des événements et attractions populaires dans les parcs à thème Universal Destinations & Experiences.

pt-BR.title: Shrek 5 | Teaser Trailer Oficial
pt-BR.description:
Nos cinemas no verão de 2027
Siga-nos no Facebook em / https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Encontre-nos no Instagram em / https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/ 
Siga-nos no Twitter em https://x.com/UniversalIND

No próximo verão, a DreamWorks Animation convida o público para uma nova e emocionante aventura de comédia mágica
de uma das franquias de animação mais amadas de todos os tempos: Shrek 5.

As lendas da comédia Mike Myers, o indicado ao Oscar® Eddie Murphy e Cameron Diaz retornam aos seus
papéis icônicos como Shrek, Burro e Fiona. A superestrela vencedora do Emmy, Zendaya (A Odisseia,
franquia Duna), junta-se ao elenco como Felicia, filha de Shrek e Fiona, juntamente com Marcello
Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) e Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Fora de Série)
como os irmãos de Felicia, Fergus e Farkle.

Shrek 5 é dirigido pelos aclamados cineastas e veteranos da franquia Shrek, Conrad Vernon e
Walt Dohrn. Vernon fez parte da equipe de direção do indicado ao Oscar® Shrek 2, bem como de Madagascar 3: Os Procurados da Europa e
Monstros vs. Alienígenas, da DreamWorks Animation. Vernon também dublou o personagem favorito dos fãs de Shrek, o Homem-Biscoito,
também conhecido como "Gingy", em todos os títulos do Universo Shrek. Dohrn trabalhou no segundo e terceiro filmes do Shrek como roteirista e artista, e como chefe de história no quarto filme. Dohrn também dublou o personagem Rumpelstiltskin em Shrek Para Sempre. Dohrn foi codiretor do primeiro filme dos Trolls e dirigiu Trolls 2: Turnê Mundial e Trolls: A Banda.

O filme é produzido pela produtora Gina Shay (franquia Trolls), que também produziu Shrek Para Sempre, e pelo CEO da Illumination e indicado ao Oscar® Chris Meledandri (franquias Super Mario, Meu Malvado Favorito e Minions). O filme tem codireção de Brad Ableson (Minions 2: A Origem de Gru, Os Simpsons).

Nas últimas duas décadas, o público tem se encantado com as deliciosas e irreverentes
aventuras de um ogro incompreendido e seu grupo heterogêneo de personagens de contos de fadas, baseadas no
livro do aclamado autor William Steig. Começando em 2001 com Shrek, vencedor do primeiro
Oscar® de Melhor Animação, Shrek, Burro e Fiona (junto com seus
amigos, familiares e algozes) se tornaram parte indelével da cultura pop, lembrando
o público ao redor do mundo que a beleza está nos olhos de quem vê.


Os quatro filmes de Shrek arrecadaram mais de US$ 2,9 bilhões em todo o mundo, dando origem a um espetáculo ao vivo em turnê global, um musical premiado da Broadway que recebeu oito indicações ao Tony e 12 indicações ao Drama Desk, além de um destino turístico imersivo de primeira linha em Londres e eventos e atrações populares nos parques temáticos da Universal Destinations & Experiences.

id.title: Shrek 5 | Teaser Trailer Resmi Bahasa Hindi
id.description:
Di bioskop musim panas 2027
Ikuti kami di Facebook di / https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Temukan kami di Instagram di / https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/ 
Ikuti kami di Twitter di https://x.com/UniversalIND

Musim panas mendatang, DreamWorks Animation mengajak penonton untuk menikmati petualangan komedi baru yang mendebarkan dan ajaib dari salah satu franchise animasi global paling dicintai sepanjang masa: Shrek 5.

Legenda komedi Mike Myers, nominasi Oscar ®️ Eddie Murphy, dan Cameron Diaz kembali memerankan peran khas mereka sebagai Shrek, Donkey, dan Fiona. Superstar pemenang Emmy, Zendaya (The Odyssey, franchise Dune) bergabung dengan para pemeran sebagai Felicia, putri Shrek dan Fiona, bersama dengan Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) dan Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) sebagai saudara laki-laki Felicia, Fergus dan Farkle.

Shrek 5 disutradarai oleh pembuat film terkenal dan veteran franchise Shrek, Conrad Vernon dan Walt Dohrn. Vernon adalah anggota tim sutradara di film nominasi Academy Award®️ Shrek 2 serta di film animasi DreamWorks, Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted dan Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon juga telah mengisi suara Gingerbread Man, alias “Gingy,” yang menjadi favorit penggemar Shrek di semua judul di Shrek Universe. Dohrn bekerja pada film Shrek kedua dan ketiga sebagai penulis dan seniman, dan sebagai Kepala Cerita pada film keempat. Dohrn juga mengisi suara karakter Rumpelstiltskin di Shrek Forever After. Dohrn menjabat sebagai co-sutradara pada film Trolls pertama dan menyutradarai Trolls World Tour dan Trolls Band Together.

Film ini diproduseri oleh produser yang kembali, Gina Shay (franchise Trolls), yang memproduseri Shrek Forever After, dan oleh CEO Illumination dan nomine Academy Award®️, Chris Meledandri (franchise Super Mario, Despicable Me, dan Minions). Film ini disutradarai bersama oleh Brad Ableson (Minions: The Rise of Gru, The Simpsons).

Selama dua dekade terakhir, penonton telah terpesona oleh petualangan yang menyenangkan dan kurang ajar dari seorang ogre yang disalahpahami dan kelompoknya yang terdiri dari tokoh-tokoh dongeng yang nakal, berdasarkan buku karya penulis terkenal William Steig. Dimulai pada tahun 2001 dengan Shrek, pemenang Academy Award®️ pertama untuk Film Animasi Terbaik, Shrek, Donkey, dan Fiona (bersama dengan teman, keluarga, dan pengganggu mereka), telah tumbuh menjadi bagian tak terpisahkan dari budaya pop, mengingatkan penonton di seluruh dunia bahwa keindahan terletak pada mata yang memandang.

Keempat film Shrek telah menghasilkan lebih dari $2,9 miliar di seluruh dunia, melahirkan pertunjukan tur langsung global, musikal Broadway pemenang penghargaan yang meraih delapan nominasi Tony dan 12 nominasi Drama Desk, ditambah destinasi wisata utama yang imersif di London dan acara serta atraksi populer di seluruh taman hiburan Universal Destinations & Experiences.

snippet.title: 🔥 GTA 5 LIVE 🔴 Crazy Missions & Funny Moments | PAJI IS LIVE
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6 

  #gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming

snippet.title: Deewane Hain - Teaser | Welcome to the Jungle |Amruta Fadnavis, Anand Raaj Anand| In Cinemas 26 June
snippet.description:
Jungle ke jashn mein ab saare #DeewaneHain aur celebration ke liye taiyaar hain! Sirf aapka intezaar hai, toh milte hain kal!

Get ready to relive the magic as Akshay Kumar, Raveena Tandon & Sunil Shetty reunite in a brand-new Bollywood song!

'Deewane Hain', song releasing tomorrow!  #WelcomeToTheJungle, the chaos begins in cinemas from 26th June, 2026 🍿

snippet.description:

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

হে বন্ধুরা! আশা করি আরেকটি অসাধারণ ভিডিও আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে, যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে তাহলে একটি লাইক 👍, সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে এবং ভিডিওটিকে আরও জনপ্রিয় করতে ভুলবেন না! 🖤

আমার কোনো উন্নতি করার প্রয়োজন আছে বলে মনে হলে কমেন্টে জানাবেন 😊

আমাকে ইন্সটাগ্রামে ফলো করতে ভুলবেন না: https://www.instagram.com/hydro.bgmi?igsh=cXpmd2xic2wwMGY4&utm_source=qr

কন্ট্রোল - ৬ ফিঙ্গার ক্ল (6 Finger Claw)
জাইরোস্কোপ - সর্বদা চালু (Always On)

ট্যাগ - #bgmi #clutch #highlights #tagontop #apexgaming #battlegroundsmobileindia #hydro #hydrobgmi

snippet.title: Me Tujhme Nhi Shayad – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Me Tujhme Nhi Shayad – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tu mujhme to hai...
par me tujhme nhi shayad.

Maine har dua me
sirf tera naam maanga tha...
par tera dil
mera ho na saka shayad.

Teri baaton me
apni duniya dekhi thi maine...
par teri duniya me
meri jagah hi nahi thi shayad.

“Me Tujhme Nhi Shayad”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo kisi ko apni rooh se bhi zyada chahta raha...
magar badle me
wahi mohabbat na paa saka.

Har yaad me tu hai...
har khwaab me tu hai...
magar sach ye hai ki
me tujhme nhi shayad.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
adhuri mohabbat bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

tu mujhme to hai...
me tujhme nhi shayad...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko9
beinteha chaha ho
aur phir ehsaas hua ho ki
wo aapko utna nahi chahta,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Ve Maahi | Kesari | Akshay Kumar & Parineeti Chopra | Arijit Singh & Asees Kaur | Tanishk Bagchi
snippet.description:
Presenting the soulful love anthem “Ve Maahi” from the movie Kesari — a beautiful blend of emotions, love, and longing. ❤️🎶
Let the music take you on an emotional journey… ✨
💙 Feel the love. Feel the pain. Feel Ve Maahi.
Song - Ve Maahi
Movie - Kesari
Singers - Arijit Singh & Asees Kaur
Music - Tanishk Bagchi
Programmed - Tanishk Bagchi
Lyrics - Tanishk Bagchi 
Guitar - Rhythm Shaw
Violin - Nandini Shankar
Shehnai - Omkar Dhumal 
Chorus - Afshaan, Sameer, Afsar, Imran
Mixed and Mastered - Eric Pillai@Future Sound Of Bombay
Mix Assistant Engineers - Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Supervisor - Azeem Dayani
Special Thanks Nirmaan
Starring Akshay Kumar & Parineeti Chopra 
Directed by Anurag Singh 
Produced by Hiroo Yash Johar, Aruna Bhatia, Karan Johar, Apoorva Mehta, Sunir Kheterpal 
Co-Produced by Amar Butala 
Written by Girish Kohli & Anurag Singh .
Lyrics:

O Maahi Ve.. O Maahi Ve..
Maahi Mainu Chhaddeyo Naa
Ke Tere Bin Dil Nahio Lagna
Jithe Vi Tu Chalna Ae
Maahi Main Tere Piche Piche Chalna

Tu Jee Sakdi Nai
Main Jee Sakda Nai
Koi Doosri Main Shartan Vi Rakhda Nai
Kya Tere Baajon Mera

Sacchiyan Mohabbatan Ve
Ho Maahi Kithe Hor Nahio Milna
Hor Nahio Milna
Jithe Vi Tu Chaleya Haan
Maahi Main Tere Piche Piche Chalna
(Pichhe Pichhe Chaleya)

O Maahi Ve.. O Maahi Ve..

Dil Vich Tere Yaara Mainu Rehn De
Aankhon Se Yeh Aankhon Wali Gal Kehn De
Dil Vich Tere Yaara Mainu Rehn De
Aankhon Se Yeh Aankhon Wali Gal Kehn De

Dhadkan Dil Di Ae Tainu Pehchaane
Tu Mera Hai Main Hoon Teri Rab Bhi Ye Jaane

Tu Reh Sakdi Nai, Main Reh Sakda Nai
Tere Bin Yaara Aur Kitte Takkda Nai
Kya Tere Baajon Mera

Rang Tera Chadheya Ve
Ke Hun Koi Rang Nahio Chadhna
Rang Nahio Chadheya
Jithe Vi Tu Chaleya Haan
Maahi Main Tere Pichhe Pichhe Chalna
(Pichhe Pichhe Chaleya)

Maahi Mainu Chhadeyo Naa
Ke Tere Bin Dil Nahio Lagna
Jithe Vi Tu Chalna Ae

Maahi Main Tere Piche Piche Chalna
Maahi Mainu Chhadeyo Na
Ke Tere Bin Dil Nahio Lagna
Jithe Vi Tu Chalna Ae
Maahi Main Tere Piche Piche Chalna.

Welcome to Love Retreat, your peaceful escape into the world of love, emotions, and heartfelt moments.
💖 Here, we share romantic stories, soothing relationship advice, couple goals, and emotional content that touches your heart.
Whether you're in love, missing someone, or just believe in true connections—this is your safe space.
✨ Relax. Feel. Love.

snippet.title: 🏆 Franklin Becomes A Football Legend! 😱 Neymar Needs Help | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
😱 Franklin ന്റെ ജീവിതത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും വലിയ ഫുട്ബോൾ ദിവസം...

Neymar, Messi, Ronaldo എന്നിവരെ കാണാൻ പോയ Franklin ന് അവിടെ കാത്തിരുന്നത് ഒരു വലിയ സർപ്രൈസ് ആയിരുന്നു!

ഒരു സാധാരണ ഫുട്ബോൾ ആരാധകനിൽ നിന്ന് Franklin എങ്ങനെ എല്ലാവരുടെയും പ്രതീക്ഷയായ താരമായി മാറി? ⚽🔥

ഈ കഥയുടെ അവസാനം സംഭവിക്കുന്നത് Part 2 ൽ എല്ലാം മാറ്റിമറിക്കും...

👀 Watch Till The End!

#GTA5Malayalam #Franklin #Football #Neymar #Shinchan

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Buy's World Giant Kawasaki Ninja H2r || Tamil || GTA Dharshan
snippet.description:
**Franklin & Shinchan Buy's World Giant Kawasaki Ninja H2r 🏍️🔥 | Tamil | GTA Dharshan**

Makkale! Iniku video la namma Franklin and Shinchan senthu oru mega budget triple-extra-large purchase panna poranga! World's fastest, most powerful production superbike aana **Kawasaki Ninja H2R** ah adhuவும் normal size illa... 
oru 

**GIANT MASSIVE SIZE** la vanga poranga! 😱✨

Indha ratchasa H2R oda supercharger sound-ah kettale mela parandhudvinga! Franklin indha giant bike ah namma Los Santos roads la drive panna mudiyuma? Shinchan enna settai panna poran? Full video parthu enjoy panni, unga thoughts ah comments la sollunga!

Marakkama **LIKE**, **SHARE** and **SUBSCRIBE** panni namma **GTA Dharshan** family la join pannikonga! 🔔

snippet.title: Tu High Level Ki Chhori (Official Video) - Parveen Chouhan | Mandeep Kaur | Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Raj Kumar Juneja & NDJ Music Presenting a New Haryanvi Song “Tu High Level Ki Chhori” Exclusively On NDJ MUSIC and Subscribe To Get The Best Collection of New Haryanvi Songs.

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/345654330295047/
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/tu-high-level-ki-chhori-2
Jio - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/tu-high-level-ki-chhori/QCA0YQNEYXk
Amazon Music - https://music.amazon.com/albums/B0B8ZYC8D6?marketplaceId=A3K6Y4MI8GDYMT&musicTerritory=IN&ref=dm_sh_sJF8IgfuY5DFOqeYsjxffgNVY&trackAsin=B0B914DM5D
amazon Prime - https://amazon.com/music/player/albums/B0BNXN95B2?marketplaceId=ATVPDKIKX0DER&musicTerritory=US&ref=dm_sh_5xk7LRRZqp3GfTmwtFnIyUjds&trackAsin=B0BNXPCJRG
Apple - https://music.apple.com/us/album/tu-high-level-ki-chhori/1638744809?i=1638744819
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/78yzDavFlaKVpydQqgw8KL


Album - High Level 
Song - High Level 
Singer - Parveen Chouhan
Artist - Vikash Sheoran & Mandeep Kaur
Writer - Parvindar Rana
Music - VR. Bros
Director - Ominder Dhingtania
Camera - Dheeraj 
Editor - B.Rampal
LABEL - NDJ MUSIC
PRESENTS BY - RAJU CASSETTES INDUSTRIES DELHI

Lyrics :-
********************************************************************************************************

तू हाई लेवल की छोरी सै मैं छोरा सूं ज़मींदारा का 
मैं चलाऊं ट्रैक्टर साठ रै तुम्हे शोक लग्जरी कारां का 
तू तगड़े घर की छोरी सै के पुछू तेरी बातां नै 
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै

मैं फैन सूं लख्मी चंद का तू गीत सुणै सकीरा के 
हम दिल के दरिया छोरी रै फ़क़ीर सा लकीरा के 
तू स्किन सोफ्ट की लावै क्रीम मेरे छाले पड़ रे हाथां मैं
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै

मैं खाऊं रोट बाजरे के तू पिज़्ज़े बर्गर खावै सै 
मैं धोती कुर्ता पहरणीया तन्ने जीन्स ब्रांडेड भावै सै 
तू ताऊ नै अंकल कह दे सै हम दिल तै निभावा नाता नै 
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै

म्हारे कई किल्लेया मैं बाग़ रै और आमदनी सै लाखां की 
सै चौधर पूरी म्हारी रै पर शर्म घणी सै आंख्यां की 
परविंदर राणा रिस्की सै ना जाणै फायेदे घाटेयां नै
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै
तू सो मखमल के गदेयां पै मैं पाणी लाऊँ रातां नै       

********************************************************************************************************

snippet.title: Deva Hits Collection | Best Audio Melodies & Romantic Songs
snippet.description:
Immerse yourself in the golden era of South Indian music with the Best Audio Melodies & Romantic Songs composed by the "Thenisai Thendral" Deva. This curated jukebox brings you a nostalgic journey through the most soulful, heart-touching, and iconic melody hits that defined the 90s and 2000s.
Whether you are looking to unwind, relive classic romantic moments, or simply enjoy pure retro bliss, this Deva Melodies Collection is the perfect soundtrack for your day.

snippet.title: Tu Ki Sei Sapan Pari | Full Video Song | Chhaki Suna | Anubhav Mohanty | Sheetal | Swayam | Antara
snippet.description:
#AmaraMuzikOdia #TuKiSeiSapanPari #OdiaMovieSong #OdiaSong #ChhakiSuna #OdiaMovie #AnubhavMohanty #SwayamPadhi #AntaraChakraborty #SheetalPatra #LoveSong #romanticsong 

Love is a beautiful journey filled with unforgettable moments, cherished memories, and heartfelt emotions. Tu Ki Sei Sapan Pari captures the essence of true love through its soulful melody, touching lyrics, and mesmerizing vocals.

Let yourself be carried away by this romantic musical experience that celebrates the magic of togetherness, dreams, and everlasting affection. Whether you're in love or reminiscing about special memories, this song is sure to touch your heart.

🎶 Watch, enjoy, and immerse yourself in the beauty of love with Tu Ki Sei Sapan Pari.

Lyrics : Nihar Priyaashish
Music : Baidyanath Dash

snippet.title: Tum Yun Mile Ho Official Video |  Reet Talwar,  Badshah,  Hiten
snippet.description:
11:11 ✨
A song about finding home in someone when you least expect it. ❤️
"Tum Yun Mile Ho" by Reet Talwar, Badshah & Hiten is for everyone who's ever wished for a love like this. 

#badshah #indiemusic #ipop #desipop #lovesong 

Lyrics:- 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Jee Toh Rahe The Par Saansein Nahi Thi
Milne Ki Kisi Ko Bhi Aasein Nahi Thi
 
Banjar Zameen Pe Jaise Barsa Ho Saawan
Aise Mile Tum Aake Mujhko o Saajan
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Jaise Akhri Panne ki Shayari 
Jaise Bistar Ke Niche Pade Paise
Jaise Kisi Marte Hue Ko Saans Aayi Ho Tum Aake Mujhe Mili Bilkul Hi Vaise
Har Raat Ab Nahi Chahiye Naye Chehre
Har Baat Meri Aake Tujhpe Hi Thehre
Ek Pal Ki Bhi Zindagi Na Tere Baad Mile
Saansein Meri Nikle Teri Saanson Se Pehle
Tu Mujhe Aakar Mila
To Aise Laga Ek Jism Ko Sar Mila
Dhoop Main Shajar Mila
Ek Awaara Ko Ghar Mila

Barso Se Lage Jo Vo Pyaas Bujhi Na
Behne Jo Lagi To Main Aaj Ruki Na
Tune Chhua To Laga Jag Si Gayi Mai
Jo Aaj Lagi Vo Kabhi Aag Lagi Na
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho

➟ Lyrics By Badshah

snippet.title: Gaan Re Raja Maja | ଗାଁରେ ରଜ ମଜା | Odia Raja Special Video Jukebox 2026 | Sidharth Bhakti
snippet.description:
ଗାଁରେ ରଜ ପାଳିବାର ମଜା ହିଁ କିଛି ନିଆରା! ସେହି ମାଟି ପିଣ୍ଡା, ପୋଡ଼ପିଠାର ବାସ୍ନା, ପାନ ଖାଇ ଓଠ ଲାଲ୍ କରିବା ଆଉ ଦୋଳିରେ ବସି ଆକାଶକୁ ଛୁଇଁବାର ସେହି ନିର୍ଭୟ ପ୍ରୟାସ— ଏସବୁ କେବଳ ଗାଁରେ ହିଁ ମିଳେ। ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଆଜି କର୍ମକ୍ଷେତ୍ର ପାଇଁ ନିଜ ଗାଁଠାରୁ ବହୁ ଦୂରରେ ଅଛନ୍ତି, ସେମାନଙ୍କ ଆଖିରେ ଏହି ଦିନରେ ଲୁହ ଜକେଇ ଆସେ। ସେହି ଦୂରରେ ଥିବା ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଭାଇଭଉଣୀମାନଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଏବଂ ଗାଁର ସେହି ଅମଳିନ ପରମ୍ପରାକୁ ଅନୁଭବ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସିଦ୍ଧାର୍ଥ ଭକ୍ତି ଆଣିଦେଇଛି ଏହି ବିଶେଷ ଭିଡିଓ ଜୁକ୍-ବକ୍ସ— "ଗାଁରେ ରଜ ମଜା"

#GaanReRajaMaja #SidharthBhakti #VillageRaja #RajaVideoJukebox #RajaSpecial2026 #OdiaRajaSong #RajaParba #RajoDoli #OdiaFestival #PahiliRaja #OdiaCulture #NostalgicOdiaSong

snippet.title: Banaste Dakila Gaja | ବନସ୍ତେ ଡାକିଲା ଗଜ | Traditional Raja Song 2026 | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ବର୍ଷା ଭିଜା ମାଟିର ପହିଲି ମହକ ଆଉ ଆକାଶରେ ମେଘମାଳାର ଲୁଚକାଳି ଖେଳ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ଯେତେବେଳେ କାନରେ ପଡ଼େ "ବନସ୍ତେ ଡାକିଲା ଗଜ...", ସେତେବେଳେ ଦେହରେ ଏକ ଅଦ୍ଭୁତ ଶିହରଣ ଖେଳିଯାଏ। ଏହି ଗୀତ ବାଜିଲେ ବୟସର ସୀମା ଡେଇଁ ପ୍ରତିଟି ମଣିଷ ପୁଣିଥରେ ପିଲା ପାଲଟିଯାଏ। ନୂଆ ଡ୍ରେସ୍, ପାଦରେ ଅଳତା, ହାତରେ ମେହେନ୍ଦୀ ଆଉ ସାଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଦୋଳି ପାଇଁ ଝଗଡ଼ା— ଆମ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ସଂସ୍କୃତିର ସେହି ନିଆରା ପରମ୍ପରାକୁ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ଏବଂ ଦରଦଭରା କଣ୍ଠ ଅମର କରିଦେଇଛି।

#BanasteDakilaGaja #NamitaAgrawal #TraditionalRajaSong #RajaSpecial2026 #OdiaRajaSong #RajaParba #RajoDoli #OdiaCulture #OdishaFestivals #OdiaJhia #EvergreenOdiaSong

Song : Banaste Dakila Gaja
Singer : Namita Agrawal

or.title: Banaste Dakila Gaja | ବନସ୍ତେ ଡାକିଲା ଗଜ | Traditional Raja Song 2026 | Namita Agrawal
or.description:
ବର୍ଷା ଭିଜା ମାଟିର ପହିଲି ମହକ ଆଉ ଆକାଶରେ ମେଘମାଳାର ଲୁଚକାଳି ଖେଳ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ଯେତେବେଳେ କାନରେ ପଡ଼େ "ବନସ୍ତେ ଡାକିଲା ଗଜ...", ସେତେବେଳେ ଦେହରେ ଏକ ଅଦ୍ଭୁତ ଶିହରଣ ଖେଳିଯାଏ। ଏହି ଗୀତ ବାଜିଲେ ବୟସର ସୀମା ଡେଇଁ ପ୍ରତିଟି ମଣିଷ ପୁଣିଥରେ ପିଲା ପାଲଟିଯାଏ। ନୂଆ ଡ୍ରେସ୍, ପାଦରେ ଅଳତା, ହାତରେ ମେହେନ୍ଦୀ ଆଉ ସାଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଦୋଳି ପାଇଁ ଝଗଡ଼ା— ଆମ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ସଂସ୍କୃତିର ସେହି ନିଆରା ପରମ୍ପରାକୁ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ଏବଂ ଦରଦଭରା କଣ୍ଠ ଅମର କରିଦେଇଛି।

snippet.title: 1000 Players Simulate HUNGER GAMES in Hardcore Minecraft
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP,  over 1000 players have been captured and forced to fight inside the largest HUNGER GAMES arena on the server. This is the full story of what happened...

1000 Players Simulate HUNGER GAMES in Hardcore Minecraft


Unstable SMP Members
➜  @wemmbumc 
➜   @FlameFragsMC 
➜   @ParrotX2 
➜   @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

Features:  @MapiccMc @jumperwho @DylPicklee @found2fast (twitch) @n3mtm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5kq0zgePrFAD0m1mHKbhmg ) & all the trusted members!

music: 
Christopher Larkin
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell
Tick Tock by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=As5j57PGviQ&list=RDAs5j57PGviQ&index=2 
LEMMiNO - Blackout (BGM)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RsVVcsVDt-s 
CC BY-SA 4.0 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

spoke

snippet.title: बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs
snippet.description:
बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

गणेश जी के रोज नए नए भजन सुनने के लिए हमारे साथ जुड़ें रहे व् नए नए भजनों का आनंद उठाये भजन पसंद आये तो कमेंट में '' जय श्री गणेश " जरुर लिखें || Jai Shree Shyam 🌹🌹

⭐Song :  
घर में पधारो गजानंद जी 
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे
आओ आओ गजानन आओ
सबसे पहले तुम्हे मनाऊं
गजानन कर दो बेड़ा पार
देवा मेरे घर तू आजा
श्री गणेश अमृतवाणी
सुनलो विनती दयानिधान
श्री गणेश जी के 108 नाम
सुखकर्ता दुःखहर्ता आरती
⭐Singer : Sanchit + Upasana mehta 
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)
भक्ति साधना कंपनी से भजन बनवाने के लिए और भजन रिलीज़ करवाने के लिए संपर्क करे 9466651081

localized.description:
बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

गणेश जी के रोज नए नए भजन सुनने के लिए हमारे साथ जुड़ें रहे व् नए नए भजनों का आनंद उठाये भजन पसंद आये तो कमेंट में '' जय श्री गणेश " जरुर लिखें || Jai Shree Shyam 🌹🌹

⭐Song :  
घर में पधारो गजानंद जी 
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे
आओ आओ गजानन आओ
सबसे पहले तुम्हे मनाऊं
गजानन कर दो बेड़ा पार
देवा मेरे घर तू आजा
श्री गणेश अमृतवाणी
सुनलो विनती दयानिधान
श्री गणेश जी के 108 नाम
सुखकर्ता दुःखहर्ता आरती
⭐Singer : Sanchit + Upasana mehta 
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

Zindagi Imtihan Leti Hai With Lyrics | Amitabh Bachchan, Reena Roy, Shatrughan Sinha, Hema Malini | Anwar, Suman Kalyanpur, Dr. Kamlesh Awasthi | Naseeb

A powerful and emotional classic from Naseeb (1981), beautifully sung by Anwar, Suman Kalyanpur, and Dr. Kamlesh Awasthi. This evergreen song is remembered for its inspiring message about life's trials and tribulations, heartfelt lyrics, and the memorable on-screen performances of Amitabh Bachchan, Reena Roy, Shatrughan Sinha, and Hema Malini.

Singers: Anwar, Suman Kalyanpur, Dr. Kamlesh Awasthi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Movie: Naseeb
Year of Release: 1981
Star Cast: Amitabh Bachchan, Reena Roy, Shatrughan Sinha, Hema Malini
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi

snippet.title: Kasam Khake Kaho - Lyrical | Preity Zinta | Arjun Rampal | Mahima | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Lyrics :

Hey Hey Hey Aa Ha Ha...
Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho, Dil Lagake Kaho Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai 
 
Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary

snippet.title: Chali Pillu Tari Tangadi Ye | चाली पिल्लू तारी तांगडी ये | BANJARA VIDEO SONG | Mahi Rathod Belkhed
snippet.description:
Mahi Rathod Belkhed New Banjara Sad 



👉निर्माता, दिग्दर्शक,- माही राठोड  
👉दिग्गज कलाकार - कुंदन तिवडकर 7719850943, संतोषी तीवडकर - 9359780353
👉कलाकार - जगदीश राठोड, वसू राठोड, नंदिनी नरवाडे, शंकर राठोड 
👉DOP- रोशन राठोड, विशाल राठोड 
👉एडिटिंग - RJ Studio | 
👉स्टोरी / गायक - माही राठोड  
👉गीतकार - अर्जुन राठोड | 
👉संगीत - अभिषेक सोनी | 
👉रेकॉर्डिंग -माही राठोड बेलखेड | 
👉विशेष सहकार्य - जय सेवालाल साउंड सिस्टीम मंडप डेकोरेशन बेलखेड,जयवंता आडे, देविदास राठोड, माधव राठोड, रवी आडे, अविनाश राठोड, 
👉टीम मेंबर - अमित राठोड, करण राठोड, अमोल राठोड

---------------------------------------
तार दोई हातेपर 
मेहंदी खळालीदी पिल्लू केरे नामेर 
रोरीची का मन देखन 
फायदो छेनी जानु आब मन देकन 
खुब कोवळी आरीच मन
दुसरे कन तोन देखन 
मारो प्रेम ये आधुरो रेगो ये 
काई करु नसीब र खोटो 
तार दोई हातेपर 
मेहंदी खळालीदी पिल्लू केरे नामेर 
रोरीची का मन देखन 
फायदो छेनी जानु आब मन देखन 
💔
हो 
हाळदी र पिळ साडी जानु तू पेरन 
हो रोरीची का छोरी मारो नाम लेन
हो कुकाई देखु तो हाळदी दगाता
हो छुटे लाग पिल्लू मारे डीलेन ये काटा
घळो लाडेती ओन रकाडो
आज उ जारीच मन छोडन 
सासरेन जातु वळा
गळो मार घोट जोयेनी तुये बाळा 
4 वरर्षेर. प्रेम तोंडन जारीची ये
पिल्लू वोरे लार
‼️
हो नवलेरी वेताळी उतो मडपेम जारी 
हो वोन देकताळी मारी आखीया भीजारी 
हो आंसु थाबेनी पिलू मार आखीर
वाटोतो कोणी मन जाईश छोडन
कळजेर टकडा तोन मानोतो
वाया सारु तु वेगी तयार
करली वेडी तुतो तारे मनेसरीको देखी तु दुसरो
सुकेती कर सवसार भूलादेस वेडी मारो ये प्रेम 
चाली पीलू तागड़ी ऐ

चाली पिल्लू तारी तागडी ये2
ये राळी तु चाली मन छोडताळी ये 2

--------------------------------------
